stocks.impact_theory: Micron is set to report Q2 2026 earnings after market close on March 18, with high expectations due to sold-out HBM capacity through 2026 amid AI demand surge. Hot PPI data adds pressure but AI tailwinds dominate. Market psychology: anticipation of beat leading to breakout. Historical parallels: Similar pre-earnings run-ups in 2024 led to 10-20% pops. Analogies: Like a coiled spring ready to launch (physics), or a dam about to burst with pent-up demand.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment positive on earnings hype (signal_rsi divergence noted), web news highlights HBM sold out, recent pop on Taiwan site purchase. Hot inflation secondary to AI narrative.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy calls or shares pre-earnings, potential 10% gain on beat.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short post-earnings if miss, but low probability.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings miss on margins, broader semi selloff from Fed hawkishness.

stocks.justification: Strong AI demand confirmed, earnings catalyst clear, positive pre-report momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: Debate on whether NVDA has a 'stock problem' amid valuation concerns, GTC updates digested, hot PPI raises rate fears hurting growth stocks. Psychology: FOMO turning to fatigue. Parallels: Dot-com peaks with similar expert doubts. Analogies: Overinflated balloon at risk of pop, or climber reaching thin air.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo/Barron's questioning stock sustainability, X mentions volatility, inflation data pressures mega caps.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy on AI conviction, 5% rebound if Fed dovish.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short or puts, 10% downside to support.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Unexpected positive AI news, sector rotation back to tech.

stocks.justification: Mixed signals but macro headwinds dominate short-term.

stocks.impact_theory: Tim Cook denies retirement rumors, stabilizing sentiment as AAPL acts as market anchor amid volatility. Implications: Continuity in leadership supports steady growth. Psychology: Relief rally. Parallels: Similar denials in past boosted 2-5%. Analogies: Captain steadying the ship in storm, or keystone holding arch.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive news counters broader tech weakness, X notes anomaly in sentiment strength.

stocks.justification: Reliable company, rumor denial effective but limited catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil prices surge back above $100 on supply concerns/geopolitics, boosting energy majors. Implications: Higher revenues, stagflation hedge. Psychology: Rotation to value. Parallels: 2022 oil rally +30%. Analogies: Rising tide lifting boats, or fuel to fire in inflationary environment.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo notes oil >$100, positive for XOM amid market drop.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long on oil momentum, 8% to 52w high.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Demand destruction from recession, OPEC+ increase.

stocks.justification: Direct correlation to oil price, clear macro driver.

stocks.impact_theory: Hot PPI data signals persistent inflation, raising fears of fewer rate cuts hurting NIMs less but loan growth slows. Psychology: Risk-off to defensives. Parallels: 2022 rate hike cycle volatility. Analogies: Tightening noose on growth, or brakes on speeding economy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mentioned technical weakness, futures fall on PPI, pre-Fed nerves.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short ahead of FOMC, 7% to support.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Surprise dovish Powell, strong earnings season.

stocks.justification: FOMC uncertainty high, mixed bank outlook.
